calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appeparance. There being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Continued To Sep-27-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to September 27, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
